input.tenant_message: Our ceilings are leaking badly and the landlord suggests we move instead of repairing them. Water stains and active dripping from multiple ceiling spots.

ai_output.recommended_action: Dispatch roofer or structural inspector immediately. Active ceiling leaks risk ceiling collapse and mold growth. Identify water source — possible roof damage or upstairs plumbing failure. Landlord is legally obligated to repair; tenant should document and report to housing authority if not addressed within 24 hours.

source.post_title: Landlord suggests we move instead of repairing leaky ceilings
